home.tagline: Discover my projects, skills and previous work – and get to know me better.

about.title: Get to Know Me
about.subtitle: Learn more about my background, experience and what drives my passion for technology.
about.story: I am Chad Feierstein, a passionate Full-Stack Developer and IT Administrator from Luxembourg. With a focus on Cloud Computing and modern web technologies, I create innovative digital solutions that make a difference.

services.title: What I Offer
services.subtitle: From concept to implementation - I develop customized solutions for your digital requirements.

webdev.title: Web Development
webdev.description: Modern, responsive websites with Vue.js, Nuxt.js and the latest web standards.

cloud.title: Cloud Computing
cloud.description: Scalable cloud solutions with AWS, Google Cloud and Azure for modern applications.

itadmin.title: IT Administration
itadmin.description: Comprehensive system administration and network management for reliable infrastructure.

featured.title: Featured Project
featured.subtitle: Discover my latest innovation - where cutting-edge AI meets intuitive design.
featured.description: An advanced AI Chat Bot that conducts intelligent conversations and handles complex queries. With state-of-the-art AI technology and an elegant interface, it offers a seamless user experience.

ai.title: Intelligent AI
ai.description: Advanced language processing and context understanding

ui.title: Modern UI
ui.description: Intuitive user interface with Dark/Light Mode

story.intro: I am Chad Feierstein, a Full-Stack Web Developer and IT Administrator specializing in Cloud Computing. My passion lies in developing modern web applications and server management. With my education as an IT technician and a degree in Cloud Computing, I combine solid knowledge with practical experience to implement efficient and customized solutions.

passion.title: Passion for Technology
passion.description: My passion is for web development and server administration. I enthusiastically develop customized web applications and implement efficient server solutions.

hobbies.title: Hobbies and Interests
hobbies.description: Away from the digital world, I enjoy precious moments with my family, which includes our three furry companions. Regular meetings with friends and occasional gaming sessions provide the perfect balance to my technology-driven everyday life.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.subtitle: Professional certifications and qualifications that demonstrate my expertise in various technology areas

cta.title: Let's Work Together
cta.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear from you and discuss how I can help.

item1.title: Web Developer at Rotyre SARL
item1.description: Primary responsibility for maintaining and developing the website 'mullerpneus.lu'. Permanent position focusing on frontend development and website optimization.

item2.title: IT Cloud Engineer Internship
item2.description: 12-week internship at QPark Consulting focusing on cloud technologies and agile project methods. Work on two major cloud projects with AWS and GCP.
item2.task2: Virtual machine configuration on Google Cloud Platform
item2.task4: Static website deployment on AWS S3
item2.task5: REST API integration and data processing
item2.task6: Cloud cost optimization and best practices

item3.title: IT Technician Summer Job
item3.description: 8-week summer position at Lycée Guillaume Kroll in the IT department. Focus on network infrastructure and telephone system management.
item3.task1: Setup and management of MIXvoip phones
item3.task2: Installation of new telephone connections in server room
item3.task3: Patch panel documentation updates in Excel

item4.title: IT Technician Project Completion
item4.description: 4-week summer job to complete a website project started during the internship. Focus on backend development and SAML integration.

item5.title: IT Technician Main Internship
item5.description: 6-week internship at Lycée Guillaume Kroll focusing on web development and database design. Development of a complete website solution.

item6.title: IT Network Technician Internship
item6.description: 6-week internship at STEP Syndicat intercommunal in Peppange. Introduction to network technology and infrastructure management in a sewage treatment plant.
item6.task3: Creation of new patch panel plans

exp1.title: Helicopter Tour
exp1.description: An unforgettable experience over the landscapes of the Dominican Republic

exp3.title: Tomorrowland Belgium 2025
exp3.description: The ultimate electronic music festival experience

myChatBot.title: My Chat Bot
myChatBot.description: A modern, optimized chat application with Ollama integration for direct chat with AI models. Offers ChatGPT-like functionality with local storage and advanced features.

myPortfolio.title: My Portfolio Website
myPortfolio.description: A modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills. Built with the latest web technologies focusing on performance, accessibility, and user experience.

debianInitialSetup.title: Debian 12 - Server Initial Setup
debianInitialSetup.description: Step-by-step guide for the first important steps when setting up a fresh Debian 12 server

ollamaSetup.title: Linux - Ollama Installation
ollamaSetup.description: Complete guide for installing Ollama on Debian 12 with Apache2 reverse proxy, SSL encryption, and HTTP Basic Authentication for secure public API

cardanoNodeSetup.title: Linux - Cardano Node Installation
cardanoNodeSetup.description: Complete guide for installing a Cardano node on Debian 12 with the NIX package manager, including service configuration and monitoring

cardanoDbSyncSetup.title: Linux - Cardano DB Sync Installation
cardanoDbSyncSetup.description: Complete guide for installing Cardano DB Sync on Debian 12 with PostgreSQL database and NIX package manager, including service configuration
